ModMetaData.name: Quest Target Info
ModMetaData.author: Escarval
ModMetaData.description:
Adds an additional UI window to quest details, displaying the estimated distance to the target and fuel costs for different transport types.
When a quest with a world target is selected, an info window automatically appears on the right side of the quests tab.
Features: - Estimated distance to the quest target (in tiles) - Shuttle fuel cost (requires Odyssey DLC) - Transport Pod fuel cost - Gravship fuel cost (requires Odyssey DLC) - Collapsible UI window for minimal screen clutter
Compatibility: Designed primarily for the Odyssey DLC, but works correctly with any DLC or mod configuration.
